name: data-labeling-qa
title: Data Labeling QA — Audit Untrusted Labels Before Fine-Tuning
description: Find mislabeled examples in a training set before you waste a fine-tuning run on bad data. Runs four complementary audits: provenance/integrity checks (catches off-by-one structural bugs), cleanlab confident learning (catches random noise), high-loss monitoring, and LLM-as-judge on the flagged subset (catches systematic labeler confusion). Input is a dataframe with `data` and `untrustworthy_label` columns; output is a per-row trust score plus a prioritized review set. Includes a marimo notebook with a deliberately corrupted AG News sample so you can measure each technique's recall against known ground truth.
